Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Optasia]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Optasia is a location or entity that can be controlled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Cheska lost half her crew and ship in an attack from the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Optasia is located in the Emperor’s personal quarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Optasia is a device used for global amplification relays.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Jerri is standing with her back to the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Optasia is a flesh-shrouded cage of steel bars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Optasia can catch deadly Intent and send it out to a thousand relays around the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Optasia has a network that carries information or damage across the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — The Optasia is an object that the Elders seek to possess.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Optasia is a device that must be activated by Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Optasia is necessary for an Emperor to speak to 'them'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Optasia can be used to check for truths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The crack in the sky may have been caused by fighting near the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Optasia is an entity or object involved in the Elders' plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Optasia has sustained no permanent damage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Optasia is a cage of steel bars resembling the skeleton of a great chair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Optasia is an ancient artifact of the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Optasia's throne has a matrix of steel bars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Optasia is a device that enhances perception and allows a user to Read a building on the other side of the planet when connected to it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Optasia is a relic of the Emperor used as a throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Optasia expands awareness via a network of relays to allow Reading of anything on the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Optasia is an object that a Reader can use.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Optasia is an item used by the Empire that requires specialized preparation to use safely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Kelarac asks Calder to deliver the Optasia to him.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor is unable to use the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Optasia is the Emperor's true throne, built into his personal chambers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Optasia uses a global network of receptors to expand and channel the Emperor's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Using the Optasia requires the user to open themselves to it and Read everything it picks up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Optasia allows the user to monitor Great Elders and take action against them at a distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Using the Optasia exposes the user to the attention of the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Optasia is a device that can be used to feed oneself to Kthanikahr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — An Optasia was a device used in primitive men's culture to divine danger or predict the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Optasia is a global system of 312 concealed nodes designed to allow the Emperor to Read Intent from around the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Optasia is a pre-Imperial divination tool.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Optasia has been successfully destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Optasia is a device used by the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor produced hazy bubbles in the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Optasia is a device that can magnify the Emperor's Reading to a global scale.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Optasia is a device used to amplify Reading and send it across the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Optasia is a device built into the wall of the Emperor’s personal chambers that resembles a nest of steel bars and wires.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Optasia is covered by a mesh of barbed wire that is invested to wound intruders and treated with alchemy to incapacitate anyone who touches it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Bliss can help Calder use the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Optasia is an ancient, world-bending tool that distributes Intent throughout the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Optasia is a device used to project consciousness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Optasia was in the Emperor's chambers with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Optasia was Calder's true throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Kelarac intends to sit upon the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Optasia made the crack in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Optasia is a global network of statues designed and invested by the Emperor to amplify Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Optasia is a node or device that can be used to strike at Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Optasia provides magnification for Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Without the Optasia, Calder is an easy target.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Calder possesses an object called the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder and the Emperor sank into the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Optasia can take over a person.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Optasia is an object that could potentially free the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor shared a vision with Shera through the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — There are rumors of something the Optasia has done.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
